creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
I want to mark multimedia/xfce4-xmms-controller-plugin deprecated because:

	a) the port is set to IGNORE after xfce 4.4 got imported 12 month ago
	   because it does not work with 4.4
	b) no new version of the port got released in 3 years
	c) the MASTER_SITE is dead

	please approve adding to the Makefile:

	DEPRECATED=	Project is dead
	EXPIRATION_DATE=	2008-03-31
